1.premise: Elephants are blamed for racially selective deaths.
Elephants killing only nonwhite people would make elephants racist.

2.premise: Being killed by an elephant implies impossible inattentiveness.

1.premise: Priest abuse at deathbeds is a taboo fear rarely said aloud.

lines.label: setup

lines.label: punchline
